title: Payment to License Activation Flow - KIS transfer + GitHub collaborator auto-grant
desc: End-to-end flow from KRW bank transfer to active license: KIS incoming transfer detection, GitHub ID parsing from memo, collaborator add, pending invite UX, acceptance, expiry, renewal.
steps: Pricing: 100,000 KRW = CDP tier (read permission), 500,000 KRW = Sudo tier (write permission); transfer to KIS account [YOUR_KIS_ACCOUNT].
Memo (depositor name field) MUST be the payer's GitHub username verbatim; mismatched memo blocks auto-grant.
Detector: scripts/kis_payment_watcher.py polls KIS hourly, parses memo field, extracts github_id and amount, derives tier (100k=read, 500k=write).
Grant: detector calls 'gh api repos/kiexpert/wkappbot-sdk/collaborators/{github_id} -X PUT -f permission=read' (or write); tx_key recorded with 30-day expiry.
Pending invite UX: wkappbot startup detects pending invite via GitHub API; shows blue toast bottom-right (15s auto-dismiss, non-blocking); CDP/Sudo features stay locked, Free features keep working.
Acceptance: user clicks GitHub notifications -> View invitation -> Accept; on next wkappbot startup LicenseManager.Permission becomes 'read'/'write' and gated features unlock; toast clears.
Expiry: 30 days from grant; check_expirations() in same script auto-revokes via 'gh api ... -X DELETE'; user drops back to Free tier silently.
Renewal: pay again with same memo; new tx_key issued, permission re-granted on next hourly poll, expiry extended; no manual intervention.
Tier upgrade (CDP -> Sudo): pay 500k with same memo; detector overwrites permission=read with permission=write on next poll.
Verification: 'wkappbot license status' shows account, tier, permission, expiry days remaining, pending invites.

License check (LicenseManager.cs): reads GitHub collaborator permission on kiexpert/wkappbot-sdk. read=CDP, write=Sudo, admin=dev. Pending invite treated as read immediately. No expiry enforcement in C# yet -- revocation is external (cron or manual).

License check (LicenseManager.cs): reads GitHub collaborator permission on kiexpert/wkappbot-sdk. read=CDP, write=Sudo, admin=dev. Pending invite treated as read immediately. No expiry enforcement in C# yet -- revocation is external (cron or manual).

requirements.expect: tier: Free|CDP|Sudo with permission and expiry days

author: claude
